title: tropaeolum gracile
intro: Tropaeolum gracile, also known as the slender flame flower or flame lily, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Tropaeolum. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in South America, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tropaeolum gracile include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of colds, fever, and skin conditions, as well as acting as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Tropaeolum gracile is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used topically to treat wounds and skin irritations.
